expected_oracle_behavior.valid_cases: Each valid case expects OK status and an AssessLinesResponse-shaped dictionary matching the canonical exact-decimal oracle in suite.py.
expected_oracle_behavior.invalid_cases: Each invalid case expects gRPC INVALID_ARGUMENT; exact error-message text is intentionally not specified.
expected_oracle_behavior.rounding: Intermediate arithmetic is exact; monetary values are quantized only at response formatting using the requested or default scale and rounding mode.
expected_oracle_behavior.totals: Totals include only numeric lines and preserve input line response order.

case_manifest.name: default_cascade_selects_lower_positive_candidate
case_manifest.expected_oracle_behavior: A lower positive candidate unit amount is selected; omitted strategy and rounding use CASCADE and HALF_EVEN; two percent levels cascade; totals equal the rounded numeric line values.
mutant_behaviors_expected_to_fail: applies SUM when discount_strategy is unspecified

case_manifest.name: sum_strategy_adds_percent_levels_once
case_manifest.expected_oracle_behavior: SUM adds 12.5 and 7.5 into one 20 percent reduction before output rounding.

case_manifest.name: fixed_reductions_apply_after_all_percent_reductions
case_manifest.expected_oracle_behavior: All percentage reductions are applied before fixed reductions, even when a fixed reduction appears earlier in the request list.
mutant_behaviors_expected_to_fail: applies reductions strictly in request order
treats fixed amounts as per-unit discounts

case_manifest.name: exact_intermediate_arithmetic_precedes_output_quantization
case_manifest.expected_oracle_behavior: The service multiplies 0.333 by quantity exactly, subtracts 0.009 exactly, and only then quantizes response amounts.
mutant_behaviors_expected_to_fail: rounds unit amount before multiplying by quantity

case_manifest.name: half_even_is_default_rounding_mode
case_manifest.expected_oracle_behavior: Omitted rounding_mode uses HALF_EVEN, so 1.005 at scale 2 is formatted as 1.00.
mutant_behaviors_expected_to_fail: defaults to HALF_UP instead of HALF_EVEN

case_manifest.name: half_up_rounding_mode_is_honored
case_manifest.expected_oracle_behavior: Explicit HALF_UP formats 1.005 at scale 2 as 1.01.

case_manifest.name: down_rounding_and_zero_scale_are_honored
case_manifest.expected_oracle_behavior: Explicit DOWN with currency_scale 0 truncates 9.99 to 9 in monetary output fields.

case_manifest.name: price_on_request_lines_are_excluded_from_numeric_totals
case_manifest.expected_oracle_behavior: The price-on-request line echoes only key, quantity, and marker; numeric totals include only the numeric line and count one price-on-request line.

case_manifest.name: candidate_must_be_positive_and_lower_than_unit
case_manifest.expected_oracle_behavior: Zero and equal candidate unit amounts are ignored and do not set promotion_applied.
mutant_behaviors_expected_to_fail: accepts zero candidate as a promotion
accepts equal candidate as a promotion

case_manifest.name: rejects_price_on_request_with_numeric_inputs
mutant_behaviors_expected_to_fail: ignores numeric inputs on price_on_request lines

case_manifest.name: rejects_too_many_percent_levels
mutant_behaviors_expected_to_fail: accepts more than four percentage levels

case_manifest.name: rejects_fixed_reduction_overrun_after_percent
case_manifest.expected_oracle_behavior: The request fails with INVALID_ARGUMENT because the fixed reduction is evaluated after percentage reductions and would make the line amount negative.
mutant_behaviors_expected_to_fail: clamps fixed reduction overrun to zero
applies fixed amount before percentage reductions

case_manifest.name: rejects_unknown_strategy
mutant_behaviors_expected_to_fail: treats unknown discount_strategy as a default

case_manifest.name: rejects_unknown_rounding_mode
mutant_behaviors_expected_to_fail: treats unknown rounding_mode as a default
